name: [BUG-001] Board list response lacks total_pages and total_count metadata
description:
Expected: GET /api/boards/ returns 'total_pages' and 'page' in the response body.
        Actual:   Response only includes 'boards' list and 'total' count — no pagination metadata.
descriptionHtml:
Expected: GET /api/boards/ returns 'total_pages' and 'page' in the response body.
    Actual:   Response only includes 'boards' list and 'total' count — no pagination metadata.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-001: GET /api/boards/ does not return total_pages for pagination

AssertionError: Pagination metadata (total_pages, page) not present in board list response
assert ('total_pages' in {'boards': [{'created_at': '2026-05-18T08:54:28.707032', 'description': 'API development tasks for sprint 1', 'id': 1, 'member_count': 3, ...}, {'created_at': '2026-05-18T08:54:28.711901', 'description': 'Test planning and automation tasks', 'id': 2, 'member_count': 2, ...}], 'total': 2})
